summary: Frontend-only landing page validation for SMP Negeri 1 Sumber Jaya. Verified all 7 sections render, all required data-testids, hero content (title/subtitle/CTAs/stats strip with B/634/46/1985), 5 nav links + smooth scroll, 4 about badges + accreditation card, visi card + 5 misi items, 6 stat cards with correct count-up values (634/308/326/46/15/21), 6 program bento cards (Kurikulum Merdeka featured + Pramuka, Seni, Olahraga, Adiwiyata, Literasi TIK), footer with address (Banda Mulya), phone (0723) 465335, email, hours, 3 social icons, copyright. Mobile menu toggle works at 390px. ZERO console errors/warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: All components are well-structured (<170 lines each), use semantic data-testid coverage, and follow accessibility (aria-label on social/mobile-toggle).
Hero/Programs use Pexels external images — fine for static landing but consider lazy-loading or local hosting for production resilience.
Smooth scroll relies on browser default (anchor href). Works across modern browsers in tests.
No backend exists by design (static landing only) — confirmed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static Indonesian landing page only — no backend. All data-testids verified. Stats use IntersectionObserver count-up; final values render correctly (634/308/326/46/15/21). Console clean. Mobile menu opens at 390px width. Verified at https://edu-gateway-33.preview.emergentagent.com.
